heating.title: Heating
heating.autoRegulationHint: Boiler temperature is set automatically based on the maximum circuit temperature
heating.scheduleDeltaHint: Reduction of the supply setpoint during active schedule hours

hints.autoRegulation: Boiler temperature will equal the maximum setpoint among all circuits
hints.boilerPower: Turn boiler heat output on or off
hints.boilerTemp: Supply temperature setpoint maintained by the boiler
hints.boilerMaxTemp: Emergency boiler shutdown when this temperature is exceeded
hints.pzaMode: Weather-compensated control — supply temperature is calculated from outdoor temperature via the curve
hints.pump: In weather-compensated mode the pump is controlled automatically, regardless of this setting
hints.supplyTemp: In weather-compensated mode this is calculated from the curve
hints.disableDuringIHB: When IHB is heating, the circuit pump is disabled
hints.scheduleEnabled: During active schedule hours, the setpoint is reduced by the configured delta
hints.scheduleDelta: How much to reduce the supply setpoint at night
hints.autofillEnabled: When pressure drops below the minimum, the system refills the circuit automatically
hints.pressureMin: Auto-refill starts when pressure drops below this value
hints.pressureMax: Auto-refill stops when pressure reaches this value

waterSupply.title: Water supply
waterSupply.tenAutoHint: The heater turns on if the boiler has not heated the water within the delay

hints.ihbAutoMode: Maintains a constant water temperature in the IHB by controlling the pump automatically
hints.ihbPump: In auto-heat mode the pump is controlled automatically, regardless of this setting
hints.ihbTemp: Temperature maintained in the IHB (effectively hot-water temperature)
hints.coldPump: Pump on/off is controlled by a pressure switch
hints.hotPump: Recirculation pump for fast hot-water delivery
hints.tenAutoMode: If the boiler has not heated the water within the delay, the electric heater turns on automatically
hints.tenDelay: Minutes to wait before switching on the electric heater in auto-mode
hints.tenPower: Electric heating element (can operate together with the boiler)
hints.almEnabled: Prevents bacterial growth — periodically raises IHB temperature on schedule
hints.almDays: Recommended to run at least once per week
hints.almStartTime: Best at night or periods of minimal water usage
hints.almDuration: Minutes to hold the elevated temperature for disinfection

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.noData: No data for the selected period

settings.title: Settings
settings.adminOnly: Settings are available to administrators only
settings.mqttTopicPrefixWarning: Warning: changing this requires updating firmware on every ESP32 device
settings.dbConnectionError: Failed to connect to the database. Check the parameters.
settings.dbNoMigrationWarning: Warning: saving only rewrites DATABASE_URL in .env — data is NOT migrated. For the first switch from SQLite to Postgres, use deploy/migrate_to_pg.sh.
settings.dbTargetEmpty: Target DB is empty — no tables. After restart the app will fail until you run alembic upgrade head and copy the data (deploy/migrate_to_pg.sh).
settings.sensorOffsetsHint: Offset is added to raw readings to correct sensor bias. Units: °C, bar, %.
settings.sensorOffsetsNoActuator: No actuator bound — value is saved to DB but won't be pushed to the device
settings.sensorAlreadyBound: Sensor is already bound to another mount point
settings.conflictError: Cannot delete: there are linked records
settings.pendingSensorsHint: Sensors publishing over MQTT that have not yet been registered in the system
settings.mqttGatewayFailed: Saved, but the gateway is unreachable — restart required
settings.deviceRawDebugHint: (RF gateway only: publish raw pulse trains to /rf_debug)
settings.deviceScanTimeout: Device did not respond. Check connection.

tips.mqttHost: IP address or hostname of the MQTT broker (Mosquitto). Usually localhost or the server IP
tips.mqttPort: MQTT broker port. 1883 standard, 8883 with TLS
tips.mqttUser: Username for MQTT broker authentication. Leave empty for no auth
tips.mqttTopicPrefix: MQTT topic prefix the gateway subscribes to for sensor data. Must match ESP32 firmware
tips.gatewayUrl: HTTP address of the DeviceGateway microservice used by the backend to dispatch device commands
tips.logLevel: Log level: DEBUG — full detail, ERROR — errors only. Restart required
tips.ackTimeout: Seconds to wait for a device ack after sending a command. No ack → WARNING in the event log
tips.heartbeatTimeout: If the device has not published a heartbeat for longer than this — ERROR. ESP32 must publish home/devices/{name}/heartbeat
tips.gatewayTimeout: Maximum wait for a response from DeviceGateway (seconds)
tips.frontendPollSeconds: How often the browser polls service and sensor status (seconds)
tips.tokenExpireMinutes: Minutes after which the access token becomes invalid. The user must refresh the session
tips.refreshExpireDays: Days after which the refresh token expires. A new sign-in is required after that
tips.sensorStaleMinutes: If a sensor has not reported for longer than this, it is considered inactive (red dot)
tips.healthPollSeconds: How often the backend polls service and sensor health (seconds)
tips.dbType: SQLite — local file, fits a single server. PostgreSQL — for scalable deployments
tips.dbPath: Path to the SQLite database file relative to the backend working directory
tips.configPrefix: config_kv key prefix. Settings of the form {prefix}_{param} are dispatched to the MQTT device as command {param}
tips.mqttDeviceName: MQTT device name (ESP32 node_name). Commands are published to home/devices/{device}/command/{param}
tips.configKey: Key from config_kv (e.g. heating_boiler_power). Changing this setting dispatches a command to the device
tips.deviceName: MQTT device name (node_name from ESP32 firmware). Command is published to home/devices/{device}/command/{param}
tips.mqttParam: MQTT command parameter name. ESP32 receives JSON {"param": "value"}

about.title: About
about.description: HomeSite — monitoring and control system for a country house engineering infrastructure.
